shortDescription: Income-generating duplex in Kensington Market with 5 bedrooms across two self-contained units.
fullDescription: Welcome to 22 Nassau Street in the vibrant Kensington Market neighbourhood. This income-producing duplex features two self-contained units, each with its own entrance and utilities. The main living area showcases original architectural details alongside tasteful modern updates. The kitchen is a chef’s dream with quartz countertops, a large island, and high-end stainless-steel appliances. All 5 bedrooms are generously sized, and the primary offers a spa-inspired four-piece ensuite. Smart-home features, updated plumbing, and a newer roof provide peace of mind for years to come. The location is unbeatable: steps to TTC transit, acclaimed restaurants, and everyday shopping.
keyFeatures: Open kitchen with waterfall island and pot lights
Cosy living room with gas fireplace
Updated kitchen with quartz counters and soft-close cabinetry
